# Dappier API Guide

## Docs

- [AI Recommendations API](https://docs.dappier.com/ai_recommendations_api.md)
- [AI Recommendations API](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/ai-recommendations.md): Retrieve articles based on queries or URLs, powered by semantic search.
- [Ask AI Analytics](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/ask-ai-analytics.md): Publisher-facing Ask AI engagement rollup: summary KPIs plus a daily time-series. Numbers match the Dappier platform analytics dashboard for the same filters.
- [Ask AI Logs](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/ask-ai-logs.md): Raw, paginated Ask AI conversation log rows — the same data the internal Logs → Ask AI dashboard table serves. Use this for record-level inspection; use Ask AI Analytics for aggregate reporting. Results are sorted newest-first by `timestamp`.
- [Real Time Search](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/real-time-search.md): Access real-time search with Dappier's AI models — from live web search and breaking news to stock prices and financial insights. Fast, reliable, and ready for monetization.
- [Session Intelligence](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/session-intelligence.md): Single aggregated payload describing how end users interact with a publisher's Ask AI widgets — summary KPIs, engagement time, intent breakdown, top queried topics, content-category mix, and session-engagement (query-depth) distribution. Powers the marketplace Session Intelligence dashboard in one r…
- [Sponsored Conversations Analytics](https://docs.dappier.com/api-reference/endpoint/sponsored-conversations-analytics.md): Advertiser-facing rollup for the campaigns the API key's tenant owns: summary KPIs, daily timeline, plus per-campaign, per-prompt, and click-type breakdowns. Numbers match the Dappier platform dashboard for the same filters.
- [Bot Deterrence](https://docs.dappier.com/bot-deterrence.md)
- [Configure Your AI Agent](https://docs.dappier.com/configure-ai-agent.md)
- [Configure AskAI](https://docs.dappier.com/configure-ask-ai.md)

- [🪄 Activepieces Stock Market Analyst Bot: Automate Investment Research with Real-Time Data & AI-Powered Reports](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/activepieces-stock-market-workflow.md)
- [⚙️ Build Smarter Agent.ai Agents with Dappier’s Real-Time, Verified Data Models](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/agent-ai-create-dappier-agent.md)

- [✨ Build a Health Supplement AI Advisor with Dappier, Bolt.new, and Netlify](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/bolt-askai-widget-integration.md)
- [✨ Build a Real-Time Stock Search App Using Dappier, Bolt.new, and Supabase](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/bolt-stock-market-search.md)
- [🐫 CAMEL Dynamic Travel Planner Role-Playing: Multi-Agent System with Real-Time Insights Powered by Dappier](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/camel-dynamic-travel-planner-role-playing.md)
- [🦞 Build a Real-Time Telegram AI Bot | Powered by Dappier and OpenClaw](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/clawhub-telegram-bot.md)
- [Build a Recommendation Engine](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/dappier-ai-recommendations.md)

- [Build a Real-Time Data Assistant](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/dappier-real-time-data.md)
- [🧠 Google ADK Dynamic Travel Planner: Real-Time Itineraries with Dappier](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/google-adk-dynamic-travel-planner.md)
- [🧠 Google ADK Stock Market Research Agent: Real-Time Investment Reports with Dappier](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/google-adk-stock-market-researcher.md)
- [🦜 Real-Time Market Analysis & Trading Strategy | Powered by Dappier and Langchain](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/langchain-real-time-market-strategyzer.md)
- [🦜 Automated Sports News Summarizer | Powered by Dappier and Langchain](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/langchain-sports-news-summarizer.md)
- [🦙 Dynamic Travel Planner | Powered by Dappier and LlamaIndex](https://docs.dappier.com/cookbook/recipes/llama-index-dyamic-travel-planner.md)
